# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Coreverse Website!

## Before You Start

- Search existing issues before creating a new one.
- Discuss major changes before starting work.
- Keep pull requests focused on a single change.

## Development

1. Fork the repository.
2. Create a new branch.
3. Make your changes.
4. Ensure the project builds successfully.
5. Submit a Pull Request.

## Coding Style

- Follow the existing coding style.
- Write clean and readable code.
- Keep commits small and meaningful.

## Commit Messages

Examples:

feat: add hero animation

fix: resolve login redirect bug

docs: update installation guide

refactor: simplify navbar component

## Pull Requests

Please describe:

- What changed
- Why it changed
- Screenshots (if applicable)

Thank you for helping improve Coreverse Website!
